stances.summary: A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

sources.title: H R 29 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

stances.summary: A Yea vote barred the President from declaring or enforcing a moratorium on hydraulic fracturing (fracking) for oil and gas without prior congressional approval.

sources.title: H R 26 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote barred the President from declaring or enforcing a moratorium on hydraulic fracturing (fracking) for oil and gas without prior congressional approval.

stances.summary: A Yea vote passed the 2025 budget reconciliation package extending the 2017 tax cuts, adding new tax breaks (e.g. on tips and overtime pay), cutting projected Medicaid and SNAP spending, boosting border and defense funding, and raising the debt limit.

sources.title: H R 1 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote passed the 2025 budget reconciliation package extending the 2017 tax cuts, adding new tax breaks (e.g. on tips and overtime pay), cutting projected Medicaid and SNAP spending, boosting border and defense funding, and raising the debt limit.

stances.summary: A Yea vote passed a Republican-backed alternative to extending the enhanced ACA marketplace subsidies, restructuring health-insurance premium subsidy rules for individual-market plans.

sources.title: H R 6703 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote passed a Republican-backed alternative to extending the enhanced ACA marketplace subsidies, restructuring health-insurance premium subsidy rules for individual-market plans.

stances.summary: A Yea vote barred state Medicaid programs from using federal Medicaid funds to cover gender-transition procedures for minors.

sources.title: H R 498 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote barred state Medicaid programs from using federal Medicaid funds to cover gender-transition procedures for minors.

stances.summary: A Yea vote passed the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2026, funding most of the federal government for the fiscal year and averting a shutdown.

sources.title: H R 7148 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote passed the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2026, funding most of the federal government for the fiscal year and averting a shutdown.

stances.summary: A Yea vote passed the Homeowner Energy Freedom Act, rolling back certain federal energy-efficiency and appliance/equipment regulations that affect homeowners.

sources.title: H R 4758 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote passed the Homeowner Energy Freedom Act, rolling back certain federal energy-efficiency and appliance/equipment regulations that affect homeowners.

stances.summary: A Yea vote passed the Department of Homeland Security Appropriations Act, 2026, funding DHS (including CBP and ICE border security and immigration enforcement operations) for the fiscal year.

sources.title: H R 7744 — On Passage
sources.quote: A Yea vote passed the Department of Homeland Security Appropriations Act, 2026, funding DHS (including CBP and ICE border security and immigration enforcement operations) for the fiscal year.
